text: 2. **Presence / "who is online"** — derived **on read**, never a stored boolean. Liveness = NIP-40 `expiration >= now` over `relay_status` (`materializer.rs:112` "Liveness is computed on READ"; `who_snapshot.rs:170` `live_status_for_channel`; local freshness `now - last_seen <= STATUS_TTL_SECS`, `who_snapshot.rs:318`). `remote` is computed by comparing peer host label to daemon host (`who_snapshot.rs:358`).
